description: run VISTA3D CT segmentation on a NIfTI volume and record label-map evidence (local inference)
rules: thin wrapper — inference/pre/postprocessing delegated to the official upstream HuggingFacePipelineHelper in bundle/; do not modify bundle code
label-prompts are VISTA3D class IDs (1=liver, 3=spleen, 5=right kidney, 14=left kidney); the wrapper marks the run invalid if the emitted mask contains labels outside the requested set
device auto-detected (cuda if available, else cpu); CPU fallback is supported but slow
mask + evidence JSON written under record_store; transformers must be a 4.x release
usage: Set CT_VOLUME (absolute path to the input .nii.gz) and LABEL_PROMPTS (comma-separated VISTA3D class IDs). Output: result.json plus the produced label-map NIfTI under record_store.
limitation: Thin wrapper; does not reimplement VISTA3D inference and does not compute Dice (that is the paired verifier's job). Output may be schema-valid but semantically empty if label prompts do not match the input anatomy. Requires the ~832 MB nvidia/NV-Segment-CT model bundle and runtime deps (monai/torch/transformers/nibabel); an NVIDIA GPU with CUDA is recommended. Not for clinical deployment, clinical interpretation, autonomous diagnosis, or regulatory submission; CT modality only.
